# perimeter81_route_table (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `network_id` (String) The ID of the standard network to fetch the route table for.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `routes` (List of Object) The list of route table entries for the given standard network. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--routes))

<a id="nestedatt--routes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `routes`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `interface_name` (String)
- `propagated` (Boolean)
- `subnets` (List of String)
